{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iteration One Twenty-nine
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iteration One Twenty-nine]] is called [[Oasis]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
